# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot_repository:
  type: "s3"  # or "fs" for file share
  settings:
    bucket: "my-elasticsearch-snapshots"
    region: "us-west-1"  # specify your S3 region
    access_key: "your_access_key"
    secret_key: "your_secret_key"
    # Only required for file share
    # location: "/path/to/backup" 

snapshot_creation:
  repository: "my_repository"
  snapshot_name: "snapshot_{{now \"yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss\"}}"
  indices: ["*"]  # specify indices or use '*' for all

snapshot_restoration:
  repository: "my_repository"
  snapshot_name: "snapshot_2023-10-01T10:00:00"
  indices: ["my_index"]  # specify the indices to restore
  rename_pattern: "my_index"
  rename_replacement: "my_index_restored"  # specify a new name if needed
